one_time_description: Land claim settlement proceeds paid to band members
economic_notes: Operations include Gaming Commission (VLTs, smoke shop, gas bar), Commercial Fisheries (two lobster vessels, four lobster licences), Webster Farms Limited (farming operation), and 2501745 Nova Scotia Limited (gaming facility and bingo hall). Solar project financed through Ulnooweg Development Group. Webster Farms ceased to meet GBE criteria and was fully consolidated effective April 1, 2023.
notes: Audit is qualified due to non-compliance with PS 3280 Asset Retirement Obligations — management has not completed assessment of tangible capital assets for potential AROs. Webster Farms Limited was reclassified from GBE to fully consolidated entity effective April 1, 2023, resulting in a Change in Status of GBE adjustment of -$3,514,416 to accumulated surplus. The prior year comparative accumulated surplus of $17,122,634 does not reflect this reclassification. Deferred revenue increased significantly to $8,985,177 from $3,179,184, largely due to CMHC funding of $5,855,410. No schedule of remuneration was included in the financial statements. expenses_housing taken from Social Housing line; expenses_social from Social Services segment; expenses_enterprises combines Gaming Commission, Commercial Fisheries, and Webster Farms segments. OSR includes gaming, fisheries, farming, and other enterprise revenues.
warnings: One-time items ($1) represent 0.0% of revenue — surplus may not reflect ongoing operations
Qualified audit opinion issued — financial statements may not fully reflect true position
